item.title: Cornucopia Live hlýtur tvær tilnefningar til Íslensku tónlistarverðlaunanna !! /...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (9 medier)

@bjork

Cornucopia Live hlýtur tvær tilnefningar til Íslensku tónlistarverðlaunanna !! / Two nominations from the The Icelandic Music Awards;

Björk as performer of the year and @mmparisdotcom for the album design 💗💗💗💗💗

Available for purchase at shop.bjork.com and at your local record store 💿💿💿💿💿

@onelittleindierecords @islenskutonlistarverdlaunin @smekkleysa_sm @santiagraphy

Se slideshow på Instagram

item.title: rave announcement 1: Berghain - Remix by @conrad.taylor is out, go dance!! rave ...

🎬 Video

@bjork

rave announcement 1: Berghain - Remix by @conrad.taylor is out, go dance!!

rave announcement 2: coming soooooooon.......... (save the date 12th of August 2026, come dance??)

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram

BJÖRK’S CORNUCOPIA LIVE - PHYSICAL RELEASE - Link in bio to pre-order.

item.title: Björk on the cover of National Geographic – !!! @natgeo 🐋 Link in bio for the fu...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@bjork

Björk on the cover of National Geographic – !!! @natgeo 🐋

Link in bio for the full interview.

photographs : vidar logi @vidarlogi
inflatable latex coat / sculpture : straytukay @straytukay
dress : mikiosakabe @mikiosakabe
mask : james merry @james.t.merry
coat : moncler @moncler
lace bodysuit : sarah regensburger @sarahregensburger_official
boots : rick owens @rickowensonline
styling : edda gudmundsdottir @eddagud
makeup on cover : andrew gallimore @andrewgallimakeup
hair on cover : hiroshi matsushita @mr.hiroshi.matsushita
makeup : daniel sallstrom @daniel_s_makeup
hair : ali pirzadeh @alipirzadeh
manicure : texto dallas @texto_dallas
set design : andrew lim clarkson @andrewlimclarkson
production : directors lab @directors_lab

See all the changemakers at NatGeo.com/NG33

#NatGeo33

Se slideshow på Instagram

item.author: bjork

item.title: BJÖRK’S CORNUCOPIA BOOK RELEASE I’m proud to announce the release of Cornucopia:...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@bjork

BJÖRK’S CORNUCOPIA BOOK RELEASE

I’m proud to announce the release of Cornucopia: The Book. This book documents my five-year tour, Cornucopia, designed by M/M Paris, with images shot by photographer Santiago Felipe.

Before this tour, I spent a decade working with 360-degree sound and visual software in virtual reality and animation, creating Biophilia, the first app album, and later Vulnicura as a VR album. I was deeply inspired by the idea of a fully-immersive experience, spending a spring in an Icelandic lighthouse, spreading Utopia into fully surround speakers. My intention was to bring what we had created for 21st-century VR into a 19th-century theatre—taking it from the headset to the stage.

This vision was realized with 27 moving curtains that captured projections on different textures and LED screens, creating a digitally animated show: a modern lanterna magica for live music. I also wanted to feature bespoke instruments: a magnetic harp, an aluphone, a circular flute, and a reverb chamber, specially built with an audio architect to enhance the most intimate version of a performance—in a personal chapel.

Throughout this tale, there is a subplot woven in: a second story of an avatar—a modern marionette who alchemically mutates, from puppet to puppet, from the injury of a heart wound to a fully healed state.

I hope you enjoy it.

Warmthness,

Björk

Link in bio to pre-order

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@bjork

BJÖRK’S CORNUCOPIA BOOK RELEASE

I’m proud to announce the release of Cornucopia: The Book. This book documents my five-year tour, Cornucopia, designed by M/M Paris, with images shot by photographer Santiago Felipe.

Before this tour, I spent a decade working with 360-degree sound and visual software in virtual reality and animation, creating Biophilia, the first app album, and later Vulnicura as a VR album. I was deeply inspired by the idea of a fully-immersive experience, spending a spring in an Icelandic lighthouse, spreading Utopia into fully surround speakers. My intention was to bring what we had created for 21st-century VR into a 19th-century theatre—taking it from the headset to the stage.

This vision was realized with 27 moving curtains that captured projections on different textures and LED screens, creating a digitally animated show: a modern lanterna magica for live music. I also wanted to feature bespoke instruments: a magnetic harp, an aluphone, a circular flute, and a reverb chamber, specially built with an audio architect to enhance the most intimate version of a performance—in a personal chapel.

Throughout this tale, there is a subplot woven in: a second story of an avatar—a modern marionette who alchemically mutates, from puppet to puppet, from the injury of a heart wound to a fully healed state.

I hope you enjoy it.

Warmthness,

Björk

Link in bio to pre-order

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: bjork
